creator: matthew@FreeBSD.org
text:
1.1.6 is a development version of trac, and the www/trac port has up to
now been following the release versions, with 1.0.12 being the official
recommended version for everyone to run.

How do you feel about creating a www/trac-devel port for trac-1.1.6 and
leaving www/trac at 1.0.12?  Would you like to take maintainership?
